retailers.intro: Where to find us across Taiwan

meta.about: Story Behind the Brand - Beautiful Formosa Taiwan

desc.home: A Taiwanese design brand founded by artist Akibo Lee, with products designed around the rosy periwinkle pattern — all designed and made in Taiwan.
desc.about: Taiwan is a warm island in the Pacific. The resilient rosy periwinkle mirrors its warm-hearted people. Artist Akibo Lee created Beautiful Formosa Taiwan in its honor.
desc.products: The full Beautiful Formosa Taiwan collection featuring the rosy periwinkle pattern, designed and made in Taiwan, available in red, green, blue and black.
desc.retailers: Find Beautiful Formosa Taiwan at retail locations across Taiwan and shop our rosy periwinkle collection, designed and made in Taiwan.
